## Feature: Saved Search Alerts

Registered users can save a search query and opt-in to receive email notifications when new results matching that query are added to the platform.

### Functional Requirements
- FR-01: Registered users can save up to 10 active search queries per account
- FR-02: Users can enable or disable email notifications per saved search independently
- FR-03: Notification emails are delivered within 15 minutes of new matching results appearing
- FR-04: Users can delete a saved search; deletion immediately cancels all future notifications for that query
- FR-05: Each notification email contains a deep link that opens the platform pre-filtered to the saved search results

### Non-Functional Requirements
- NFR-01: Notification delivery latency must be under 15 minutes at the 95th percentile under normal load
- NFR-02: The notification pipeline must handle 10,000 concurrent active saved searches without throughput degradation

### Business Rules
- BR-01: Free-tier accounts are limited to 3 saved searches; paid-tier accounts have no limit
- BR-02: Notifications for a given saved search must not be sent more than once per 24-hour window regardless of how many new results match
[ACTORS]: Registered user (free tier), registered user (paid tier), system notification service, platform administrator
[PRODUCT]: B2B SaaS market intelligence platform — web application used by research analysts and competitive intelligence teams
